description: Analyze the daily water intake data by calculating daily totals, determining if the 64 oz goal was met for each day, and computing the average intake and the total number of days the goal was achieved.

natural_language.prompt: You have 14 days of water intake data (morning, afternoon, evening columns). Add formulas to: (1) Calculate daily total in column E using SUM, (2) Check if 64 oz goal was met in column F using IF, (3) Calculate average daily intake using AVERAGE, (4) Count days goal was met using COUNTIF.
